creator: freebsd@bitter-almonds.com
text:
(In reply to throwaway_vthgwq4 from comment #2)

Data corruption is being reported on -CURRENT@ mailing list after the recent OpenZFS import (regardless of "block_cloning" option being enabled) ...

git: 2a58b312b62f - main - zfs: merge openzfs/zfs@431083f75,
https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-current/2023-April/003459.html
https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-current/2023-April/003460.html

... among others.
